regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Dunedin typically charge $80–$115/hr. Otago rates tend to be 5–10% lower than Christchurch. Emergency callouts add $70–$140.

businesses.name: GoFox Dunedin South
businesses.known_for: 20 years experience in kitchen and bathroom renovations and small plumbing jobs across Dunedin and Clutha.

businesses.name: Mains Plumbers
businesses.known_for: Plumbing, gas services, roofing, drainlaying and inspections across Dunedin and Clutha; handles new builds, renovations and maintenance.

businesses.name: Summit Plumbing Services
businesses.known_for: Plumbing, drainlaying, gasfitting and heating; specialises in new builds, renovations and maintenance on older Dunedin homes.
